subject: docs(theme): update documentation for TW4+DaisyUI migration, fix straggler classes
body:
Updates CLAUDE.md (tech stack, AI notes, dark mode dual-layer docs),
STYLE_GUIDE.md (entire color system rewritten for DaisyUI tokens),
SESSION_NOTES.md, and HISTORY.md. Adds shadow-glow and bg-gradient-creative
as @utility definitions in index.css. Fixes last straggler bg-red-500 in
LogoUploader.

Tags: docs, daisyui, theme, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
